# KHM Tutoring

> Expert K-12 tutoring services in Honolulu, Hawaii. Founded 2016. 300+ students helped. 5.0 parent rating.

## About

KHM Tutoring is a premium K-12 tutoring service in Honolulu, Hawaii, founded in 2016 by Kody Kim (Punahou School, UC Irvine). The company provides personalized one-on-one tutoring with 10+ expert educators, including graduates from Harvard University (Magna Cum Laude), Princeton University, Phillips Exeter Academy, and Penn State. Tutors include a Fulbright Scholar, a medical student with a top-0.5% MCAT score (525/528), and a 35-year Iolani School teaching veteran.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.khmtutoring.com/): Main page with services overview, testimonials, and consultation booking
- [About](https://www.khmtutoring.com/about): Company story, mission, team approach, and founder background
- [Educators](https://www.khmtutoring.com/educators): Full team of 10+ tutors with bios, credentials, and subject specialties
- [Contact](https://www.khmtutoring.com/contact): Contact form, email, phone, and hours for booking consultations
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.khmtutoring.com/privacy): Data collection and usage policies

## Services

- Math Tutoring (arithmetic through AP Calculus)
- English Tutoring (reading comprehension, essay writing, grammar, vocabulary)
- SAT Prep (comprehensive test preparation with proven score improvement)
- SSAT Prep (private school admissions test preparation)
- AP Subject Tutoring (Advanced Placement exam preparation)
- College Counseling & Essay Writing (applications, admissions consulting)
- Online Tutoring (via Zoom for all of Hawaii)
- In-Home Tutoring (Honolulu & Oahu)

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2016 by Kody Kim
- Students helped: 300+
- Parent rating: 5.0 / 5.0
- Team size: 10+ expert tutors
- Service area: Honolulu, Oahu, and all of Hawaii
- Delivery: In-home, library, or online via Zoom
- Hours: Daily 8 AM – 10 PM
- Free initial consultation available
- Not a franchise — locally owned and operated
- Specialized in Hawaii private school prep (Punahou, Iolani)
